Mental health of children and adolescents: Early identification of psychological risks (心理风险早期识别), digital interventions, and the development of an AI-driven physical and mental health support system (AI驱动的身心健康支持体系) (focusing on depression, anxiety, school aversion, and Problematic Internet Use (问题性网络使用), among others)
